contact.title: Contact | Ezequiel Fernández, Full Stack Developer
contact.description: Contact form for team opportunities, technical collaborations or work proposals.

contentSection.heading: How I Collaborate
contentSection.paragraph1: My integration process starts with a technical conversation to understand the architecture, stack, and team goals. I adapt quickly to existing codebases, coding conventions, and established workflows. I value clear communication, constructive feedback, and continuous improvement of both the product and the development process.
contentSection.paragraph2: I thrive in environments that prioritize software quality, automated testing, and well-reasoned technical decisions. My experience covers full-stack applications with React and Node.js, CLI tools, process automation, and relational database systems. If your team works with TypeScript, continuous integration, and clean architecture, I can contribute from the first sprint.

hero.label: Open to joining a team
hero.titleAccessible: I want to join a team and build something precise.
hero.description: I'm looking to join a team where I can translate complex requirements into clean, accessible, high-performance interfaces. Reach out if you want to discuss a role or a concrete opportunity.
